code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let b = byte_or_zero(input, i)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    mut sign = 1
    let first = byte_or_zero(input, i)
    if first == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if first == 43
      i = i + 1
    end

    mut num = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        let c = byte_or_zero(input, i)
        if is_digit(c)
          num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    sum = sum + sign * num
    count = count + 1
  end
end

let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
